title: Engravings
body:
Engravings... give no tactical adventage whatsoever. You get additional points for style though! 
# Lore
This mod allows you to add lore to your items by combinig them with books in anvil.
Each page is a separate line of lore.
# Names
You can also combine a name tag with a book the contents of the first page are moved to the tags name. If you have a mod that allows you to change colors of text it will be copied as well!
Once you rename your tag, any item can be combined with it to name the item!
# Config
Mod can be configured to change the cost of renaming and adding lore.
Setting negative values of level cost will disable mechanics.
